results.query: What entities are related to healthcare?
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (e:__Entity__) WHERE e.description CONTAINS 'healthcare' RETURN e.name

results.query: Show me all people who work at TechNova Corporation
Find companies founded in Austin, Texas
results.generated_cypher: MATCH (c:__Entity__)-[:FOUNDED_BY]->(f:__Entity__)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(l:__Entity__) WHERE l.name CONTAINS 'Austin' RETURN c.name
